site_description: The Galaxy Training website provides educational materials and resources for using the Galaxy data analysis platform.

content_types.description: Individual tutorials that explain how to perform specific tasks or analyses using Galaxy.

navigation.description: The main training materials page is paginated.

examples.title: Introduction to Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial introduces the Galaxy interface and basic workflow creation.

examples.title: Filtering data with Galaxy
examples.description: Learn how to filter data in Galaxy using various filtering tools and parameters.

examples.title: Introduction to RNA-Seq with Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial covers the basic steps of an RNA-Seq analysis using Galaxy.

examples.title: Metagenomics with Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial provides an introduction to metagenomics analysis using Galaxy.

content_types.typical_structure: Tutorials usually consist of a title, introductory text, and a series of steps with screenshots and explanations. URLs typically follow a `/training-material/tutorials/[topic]/[topic].html` pattern.

content_types.description: Curated sets of tutorials that provide a structured learning experience on a specific topic.

navigation.description: Learning pathways are listed on a single page.

examples.title: RNA-Seq Analysis with Galaxy
examples.description: This pathway guides users through a comprehensive RNA-Seq analysis workflow using Galaxy, from data import to differential expression analysis.

examples.title: Metagenomics with Galaxy
examples.description: This pathway explores the analysis of metagenomic data using Galaxy, covering steps like quality control, taxonomic profiling and functional analysis.

examples.title: ChIP-Seq analysis with Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial provides a basic introduction to ChIP-Seq analysis using Galaxy.

examples.title: Variant Calling with GATK and Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial shows you how to call variants using GATK in Galaxy.

content_types.typical_structure: Learning pathways present a list of linked tutorials with descriptions outlining the overall learning objectives. URLs typically follow a `/training-material/tutorials/[topic]/[topic].html` pattern.

content_types.description: A listing of particularly useful or important Galaxy Training materials.

navigation.description: Hall of Fame materials are listed on a single page

examples.title: Introduction to RNA-Seq with Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial covers the basic steps of an RNA-Seq analysis using Galaxy.

examples.title: Metagenomics with Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial provides an introduction to metagenomics analysis using Galaxy.

examples.title: GWAS with PLINK in Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial provides an introduction to Genome-Wide Association Studies (GWAS) using PLINK in Galaxy.

examples.title: Variant calling with GATK in Galaxy
examples.description: This tutorial provides an introduction to variant calling with GATK in Galaxy.

content_types.typical_structure: Similar to tutorials, but flagged as a 'Hall of Fame' material. URLs typically follow a `/training-material/tutorials/[topic]/[topic].html` pattern.
